explanation: The response correctly identifies the memory-bound bottleneck with HIGH confidence, cites specific metric values (60.3% DRAM BW utilization, 59.9% long scoreboard stalls, 93.1% occupancy, 2 FLOPs per 12 bytes), and correctly frames long scoreboard stalls as a symptom of memory latency rather than the primary cause, keeping DRAM bandwidth as the true bottleneck driver.
